gate: ASM-0703 maintainer-ratified two-part rule (zero hard-defect-class findings AND blind naturalness >= 5/10, BOTH judge families)

instrument.header_and_rubric: byte-identical to poc/knull/quality-gate-v2/build_gate_prompt.py (only the store path differs)
instrument.order_map: prompt.new108.order.json — byte-identical to the v2 pinned map (same 108 labels, deterministic ascending-label order)
instrument.blindness: headwords withheld; definition texts only; no project/NSM/experiment context; judges never told a comparison set or gate exists; blinding grep (kernel|nsm|truthstyle|f2b|knull) zero hits on prompt and both raw outputs

gpt56.interface: npx -y @openai/codex@0.144.1 exec, effort high, -s read-only, --ignore-user-config --ephemeral --disable memories --disable standalone_web_search, empty out-of-repo workdir (/tmp/gatewd-gpt56-108.yBOWgL)
gpt56.tripwires: zero tool/command events in transcript; exit 0

haiku.interface: headless claude -p per poc/truthstyle-2x2/judges-invocation.md 4.3 + 4.3.1 (MAX_THINKING_TOKENS=0, --tools '', --setting-sources '', --strict-mcp-config, --no-session-persistence, subscription auth env -u ANTHROPIC_API_KEY), empty out-of-repo workdir (/tmp/gatewd-haiku-108.*), claude-code 2.1.201
haiku.tripwires: init tools==[] AND mcp_servers==[]; apiKeySource none; single text block (no thinking); num_turns 1; permission_denials []; modelUsage keys == [claude-haiku-4-5-20251001]; exit 0

anaphoric_renaming.haiku_finding: entry 87 (reminder): 'a matter' — NOTE: refers to the thing recalled, not a re-reference to the definiendum; reported as measured, unedited

verdict.part1_defect_audit: NOT clean as-stated: one anaphoric-renaming finding (Haiku, entry 87); staged observers and non-definitional material zero from BOTH families; GPT-5.6 zero in all three hard classes
verdict.part2_naturalness_floor: NOT met: GPT-5.6 8/10 PASS (>=5), Haiku 4/10 FAIL (<5); the floor requires BOTH families
verdict.why: Haiku attributes the residual unnaturalness to template uniformity across the set ('rigid parallelism and repetitive syntactic templates', 'algorithmic or template-driven composition'), no longer to entry length (v2's diagnosis); both judges independently name entry 62 (kind, gufo:Kind) least natural
verdict.disposition: freeze precondition NOT met; escalate to maintainer (ASM-0706 pattern) — coordinator does not freeze

run_by: Fable coordinator session (ASM-0703 re-run on v3 store; MEASURED, first valid answer final, no re-rolls)
